title: Product Recommendation
description: AI v1 product recommendation contract that must rely on sellable/availability guards and approved product knowledge.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05, TECH-05, TECH-02, and TECH-04. AI must not recommend products blocked by out-of-stock, recall, sale lock, or claim guard unless offering a sellable alternative. TODO: recommendation scoring taxonomy is not defined.

customer_memory_ref_id.description: Customer memory reference used under privacy policy.

claim_guard_result_id.description: Claim guard result for product claims.

quote_snapshot_id.description: QuoteSnapshot if recommendation includes final price.

recommendation_status.description: Recommendation status. TODO: define official recommendation status enum.

sellable_required.description: Invariant: recommendation must pass sellable/availability guard.
